RepGest		1875623	1878898	pretends to crack a mangosteen open
RepGest		1878898	1882148	describing the inside of the fruit
RepGest		1883109	1885329	pretends to peel off segments
RepGest		1890256	1893145	forms the shape of the mangosteen with hands
RepGest		1893564	1894304	representing an orange
RepGest		1912709	1916179	indicates the size of a fig with hands
RepGest		1939781	1941061	forms the shape of a seed with her hands
RepGest		1954079	1955099	forms the shape of a big mango with her hands
RepGest		1977539	1979009	pretends to cut the durian
RepGest		2119474	2121464	depicting the size of other mangoes
RepGest		2153564	2156034	depicting the seed inside
RepGest		2157389	2158989	depicting the seed inside
RepGest		2222327	2223597	representing a fruit
